message: tests: reduce panic! usage in conformance/serialization

files.patch:
@@ -3427,7 +3427,7 @@ mod wasm_host {
                 call_id: "call-exec-deny".to_string(),
                 capability: "exec".to_string(),
                 method: "exec".to_string(),
-                params: json!({ "command": "echo hi" }),
+                params: json!({ "command": "sh", "args": ["-c", "echo hi"] }),
                 timeout_ms: None,
                 cancel_token: None,
                 context: None,
@@ -3461,7 +3461,7 @@ mod wasm_host {
                 call_id: "call-exec-ok".to_string(),
                 capability: "exec".to_string(),
                 method: "exec".to_string(),
-                params: json!({ "command": "echo hello" }),
+                params: json!({ "command": "sh", "args": ["-c", "printf hello"] }),
                 timeout_ms: None,
                 cancel_token: None,
                 context: None,
